prose.en: Provide {param:at-03.02_odp.01} with initial and {param:at-03.02_odp.02} training in the employment and operation of physical security controls.

guidance.en: Physical security controls include physical access control devices, physical intrusion and detection alarms, operating procedures for facility security guards, and monitoring or surveillance equipment.

prose.en: {param:at-03.02_odp.01} is/are provided with initial and refresher training {param:at-03.02_odp.02} in the employment and operation of physical security controls.

objects.en: Security and privacy awareness and training policy
procedures addressing security and privacy training implementation
Organizational personnel with responsibilities for role-based security and privacy training
organizational personnel with responsibilities for employing and operating physical security controls

guidelines.en: personnel or roles to be provided with initial and refresher training in the employment and operation of physical security controls is/are defined;
the frequency at which to provide refresher training in the employment and operation of physical security controls is defined;
